problem: GitHub Actions runner may commit locally but fail to push when remote main changed concurrently.

rules.rule: Local commit SHA is not release proof until pushed or verified on remote.
Runner must retry push after fetch/rebase on non-fast-forward rejection.
If GitHub job status is failed, runner summary status=completed is not accepted as PASS.
After push, proof must verify remote HEAD or record that verification is pending.

recommended_push_algorithm: git pull --rebase origin main or git rebase origin/main
retry up to 3 times on non-fast-forward
